description: Simple convertible / reverse convertible pricer. Worst-of on one or multiple underlyings with no barrier monitoring. Supports both reverse convertible (short put) and standard convertible (long call) payoffs.

required_fields.name: coupon_schedule
required_fields.description: List of {date (DD-MM-YYYY), amount} objects for periodic coupon payments

item_fields.name: conversion_ratio
item_fields.description: Optional — derived as denomination / strike_level if absent

optional_fields.name: mc_time_steps
optional_fields.description: Number of time steps per simulated path

optional_fields.name: issuer_spread_bp
optional_fields.description: Z-spread override; falls back to credit_spread_bp if absent

optional_fields.name: correlation
optional_fields.description: NxN correlation matrix for multi-underlying paths (list of lists of floats)
